comments.author: @powerball200
comments.text: how much will the house cost for 2 beds ?

replies.author: @powerball200
replies.text: ​@ThePlanetJournalGlobeholy S 😱. Why they are higher 😭? So mean people in Reykjavik are rich who have homes there or are they living in rent?

replies.author: @ThePlanetJournalGlobe
replies.text:
@powerball200 
Thank you for watching! Housing prices in Iceland vary greatly depending on the location. Generally, a 2-bedroom home can range from $400,000 to over $600,000 USD. Prices in the capital, Reykjavik, are typically much higher than in the rural countryside.

comments.author: @Apeeps
comments.text: Iceland but green, Greenland but Icy. why is that?

replies.author: @ThePlanetJournalGlobe
replies.text: Thank you for the great question! It’s one of history’s most famous ironies. Legend says Viking explorers named them this way to mislead others: Erik the Red named 'Greenland' to attract settlers, while 'Iceland' was named by a sailor who spotted ice in a fjord. Geographically, the Gulf Stream also keeps Iceland much greener than its name suggests!

The true beauty of the planet rather than the hate and crime we are bombarded with from the evil that is going on in the world.

I was in Calabria Italy last week. There is so much beauty out there. We are going to mainland Greece, Olympiada Halkidiki next month.

replies.author: @ThePlanetJournalGlobe
replies.text: @Marcus-g6t9c Thank you so much for such a heartfelt comment. This is exactly why we create these documentaries—to provide a peaceful window into the world's natural beauty amidst all the noise. We are honored to be your 'escape.' Calabria sounds stunning, and we wish you an incredible trip to Greece next month! Safe travels!

comments.author: @forgottencampingsecrets
comments.text: oh my. I'm sure taking a deep breath here will feel like standing under a waterfall.

replies.author: @ThePlanetJournalGlobe
replies.text:
@forgottencampingsecrets
That is a beautiful way to put it! The air in Iceland is incredibly crisp and pure, making every breath feel truly revitalizing. Thank you so much for watching and for your kind words!
